The little park is lovely. They should pave the access road; it's a mud pit in winter.

reviews.comment:
Cómo es la única estación de servicio que está en medio de la nada, te cobran como quieren. No funciona la app, afuera para pagar el combustible y adentro para compras. Además para cargar agua te cobran.

(Translated by Google)
Since it's the only gas station in the middle of nowhere, they charge whatever they want. The app doesn't work; you have to pay for fuel outside and for purchases inside. They even charge you to fill up with water.

reviews.comment:
De las peores ypf que deben existir en el pais,

Se que esta en el medio de la nada despues de hacer muchos km, pero si podes evitar parar aca te vas a hacer un favor

La suciedad es mucha, y si el plan es tomar un cafe para relajar despues de manejar un tramo largo estas en el lugar equivocado. Musica al palo, cantidad de gente yendo y viniendo, y una estetica de años 80, pero cuando te agarro la hiper de alfonsin.

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst YPF gas stations in the country.

I know it's in the middle of nowhere after driving many kilometers, but if you can avoid stopping here, you'll be doing yourself a favor.

It's incredibly dirty, and if your plan is to relax with a coffee after a long drive, you're in the wrong place. The music is blasting, there are tons of people coming and going, and the decor is straight out of the '80s. But when you get hit by the Alfonsín hyperinflation...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoeE0ySk9NRWt6WWw5b1VYbHZRVTFTTWxWaFZWRRAB

reviews.comment:
No entiendo cómo  siendo esta estación  la única  que se tiene de Trelew a Comodoro no tiene servicios .Cierra a las 22hs .

(Translated by Google)
I don't understand how, being the only station between Trelew and Comodoro, it doesn't have any services. It closes at 10 PM.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención, faltaría una gomería porque no hay en la zona y es muy fácil pinchar un neumático en los caminos de ripio.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, a tire shop would be a welcome addition because there isn't one in the area and it's very easy to get a flat tire on the gravel roads.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURncTRuX2hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio de playa bien pero en el Full tremenda la espera, es un lugar clave y había solo una persona atendiendo y esto fue en dos oportunidades así que es así
El empleado ejemplar porque atendía con mucha cordialidad ampesqr de la presión de los que esperan
Deben poneras personal

(Translated by Google)
The beach service was good, but the wait at the Full was terrible. It's a key location, and there was only one person working, and this happened twice. The employee was exemplary because he was very friendly despite the pressure from those waiting. They need to hire more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WUE1tOURObk0xUkRWUE5HTllhMll4UVRKVFdrRRAB
